name: Constance leather mini bag
description:
Hermès Constance Slim Wallet — Mauve Sylvestre Epsom, Palladium Hardware
Description:
Authentic Hermès Constance Slim Wallet in the highly coveted and now discontinued Mauve Sylvestre colorway — a soft, sophisticated mauve pink that has become one of the most sought-after Hermès shades on the secondary market.
	•	Color: Mauve Sylvestre 
	•	Leather: Epsom calfskin
	•	Hardware: Palladium / silver “H” clasp

Features:
	•	Iconic “H” turn-lock closure
	•	5 credit card slots
	•	Removable zip coin purse
	•	Belt loop on the back (can be threaded onto a belt)
	•	Slim, compact silhouette — fits easily in any bag

Condition: Excellent pre-owned condition — please refer to photos for detailed visual reference. 

Why this piece: Mauve Sylvestre has been retired from Hermès’ current color offering, making this a rare find. The Constance Slim is the most versatile of Hermès’ wallets — slim enough to carry as a clutch with the belt loop, and a true daily essential.
